spells.description: Upon running out of energy Arcanotron Custos begins recharging, drawing Energy Orbs toward itself and increasing damage taken by $s4% for $d.
spells.name: Refueling Protocol
spells.notes: Recovered from a Casts CSV. Self-buff (Buffs CSV: applies to self ~20s) - likely an energize/empower; verify whether it warrants purge/soothe/stop.

spells.description: An Energy Orb refueling Arcanotron Custos creates an arcane explosion inflicting $474414s1 Arcane damage to all players and increasing the damage inflicted by Arcanotron Custos by $474407s1%.
spells.name: Arcane Eruption
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): RECOVERED (no Casts event). measured max=532,722, ~4.1 tgt. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.description: Arcanotron Custos strikes it's current target with destructive force inflicting $s1 Arcane damage and knocking them back.
spells.name: Repulsing Slam
spells.notes: Recovered from a WCL Casts CSV; spell_id 474496 unique in DB2 SpellName. Targeted slam: measured TANK-ONLY (tank_buster, 61 samples, max ~558k) + DB2 knockback. is_lethal set from the measured max hit (deaths is thin here — players avoid it).

spells.description: Arcanotron Custos suppresses the movement of several players, inflicting $s1 Arcane damage every $t1 sec and rooting them for $d.
spells.name: Ethereal Shackles
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): RECOVERED (no Casts event). measured max=234,894, 161 applies, ~1.2 tgt, DoT. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.description: Arcanotron Custos expels Arcane energy creating a pool of $@spellname1214089 at its feet, inflicting $s3 damage to all players and knocking them back.
spells.name: Arcane Expulsion
spells.notes: Recovered from a Casts CSV. 1214081 disambiguated by the 3.00s cast time + adjacency to Ethereal Shackles 1214038. Measured party-wide UNAVOIDABLE (4.94/5, is_aoe) with max ~447k -> is_lethal (a one-shot for an unmitigated squishy).

spells.description: Inflicts $s1 Arcane damage every $t second for $d. This effect stacks.
spells.name: Unstable Energy
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): RECOVERED (no Casts event). measured max=307,131, 352 applies, ~1.1 tgt, DoT. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.description: Seranel hurls an Arcane infused glaive at a target inflicting ${$s1+$1225796s1} Arcane damage and an additional $1225796s1 Arcane damage every $t2 sec to players within $1225796A2 yards. The glaive bounces to $s3 nearby players.
spells.name: Runic Mark
spells.notes: From a Casts CSV (WCL rate-limited); 1224801 = the only 3.00s 'Runic Mark' in DB2. Targeted mark on a player; verify is_lethal/dispellable in-game. | is_lethal:true EDITORIAL (user 2026-06-25): a targeted-mark personal-defensive check — affected player uses a defensive / health pot / healer external. measured deaths thin BECAUSE good players defensive it. | dot:true EDITORIAL (user 2026-06-25): tooltip Runic Glaive = cast hit + additional Arcane damage every 1 sec to players within 4 yards, bounces to 1 nearby. Recurring ticks confirmed in WCL events.

spells.description:
Seranel slams his shield into the ground, inflicting $1224903s1 Arcane damage to players within $1224903A2 yards and conjuring a $@spellname1224903 at the impact area.

The $@spellname1224903 silences and pacifies players standing within and purges magical effects.
spells.name: Suppression Zone
spells.notes: From a Casts CSV; 1224903 = the only 3.00s 'Suppression Zone'. The 3s cast then applies to many players (zone); verify is_aoe/positioning.

spells.description: The $@spellname1225015 consumes $@spellname1224801 from the target, causing them to emit a barrage of arcane missiles. Each missile inflicts $s1 Arcane damage to players within $A2 yards of the impact area, silencing and pacifying them for $d.
spells.name: Feedback
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): RECOVERED (no Casts event). measured max=416,995, 8 applies, ~1.0 tgt. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.description: Seranel readies a $@spellname1225201, inflicting $s1 Arcane damage to all players and pacifying any player outside of the $@spellname1225015 for $1225205d.
spells.name: Wave of Silence
spells.notes: From a Casts CSV; 1225193 = the only 5.00s 'Wave of Silence'. 5s untargeted cast (AoE silence); verify is_aoe/interruptible.

spells.description: The $@spellname1224801 violently reacts to the removal, inflicting $s1 Arcane damage to all players and reducing their movement speed by $s2% for $d. This effect stacks.
spells.name: Null Reaction
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): RECOVERED (no Casts event). measured max=346,547, 1,153 applies, ~4.9 tgt. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.coaching_note: Seranel empowers her own auto-attacks (faster + bonus Arcane damage that lands on the tank) — purge the buff to strip it; if the comp has no purge, the tank mitigates the empowered window.
spells.description: Seranel surrounds himself in a hastening ward, increasing his attack speed by $s1% and his auto attacks to inflict an additional $1271317s1 Arcane damage for $d.
spells.name: Hastening Ward
spells.notes: RESOLVED via DB2 tooltip: a self-empower buff — +attack speed AND auto-attacks deal bonus Arcane damage (id 1271317) to the tank. So the measured 'tank-only damage' is the empowered melee, not a discrete cast -> NOT a tank_buster. It's a purgeable Magic ENEMY buff; dispel_type overridden to None in spell_editorials so the engine's dispel dimension doesn't mis-route it to a healer's dispel (purge != dispel). Purge answer is in the coaching_note.

spells.description: Gemellus channels a shadowy tendril at a player, inflicting $s1 Shadow damage every $t1 sec and pulling the player towards them for $D.
spells.name: Astral Grasp
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): RECOVERED (no Casts event). measured max=153,792, 330 applies, ~1.0 tgt, DoT. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.description: Gemellus radiates players pulled within its grasp, inflicting $s1 Shadow damage every $t1 sec.
spells.name: Cosmic Radiation
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): RECOVERED (no Casts event). measured max=388,621, 53 applies. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.description:
Gemellus forms a neural link with a player, absorbing damage equal to $s2% of its maximum health. The player they are linked to receives $1253709s1% more damage for $1253709d.

Players who touch the Gemellus who linked with them before $@spellname1253707 expires disrupts the connection, removing Gemellus' damage absorb.
spells.name: Neural Link
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): RECOVERED (no Casts event). measured 342 applies. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.description: Gemellus stings a player with Cosmic Void, inflicting $s1 Shadow damage and creating a pool of $@spellname1224104 at their location. Inflicts an additional $s2 Shadow damage every $t2 sec for $d.

spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): RECOVERED (no Casts event). measured 310 applies. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.description: The Celestial Orrery's focusing lenses channel Void energy into Degentrius. Contact with a $@spellname1215786 inflicts $s1 Shadow damage and stuns the player for $d.
spells.name: Void Torrent

spells.description:
Degentrius launches unstable void energy that bounces to $s2 locations, inflicting $1215157s1 Shadow damage to any player at the point of impact.

If no player is in the area the unstable void essence erupts in $@spellname1215161.
spells.name: Unstable Void Essence

spells.description: Void energy erupts upon impact with the ground inflicting $s1 Shadow damage to all players plus an additional $s2 Shadow damage every $t2 sec for $d. This effect stacks.
spells.name: Void Destruction

spells.description:
Degentrius corrupts several players with Void energy, inflicting $s1 Shadow damage every $t1 sec. Each afflicted player receives a different duration.

Upon expiration, $@spellname1269631s launch from the player's location.
spells.name: Devouring Entropy

spells.coaching_note: Volatile orbs — sidestep them. Critical: a hit deals Shadow damage AND snares you, and the snare can cost you the next dodge. Treat it as a hard-dodge.
spells.description: Volatile masses inflict $s2 Shadow damage to players struck and additionaly reduce their movement speed by $s1% for $d.
spells.name: Entropy Orb

spells.description: Degentrius unleashes an $@spellname1271066 at its primary target inflicting Physical damage.
spells.name: Entropy Blast

spells.coaching_note: Degentrius smashes their current target — Shadow splash + a knockback to everyone near the tank. Non-tanks stay spread off the tank; pre-position so the knockback doesn't punt you into the next pack.
spells.description:
Degentrius smashes a massive fragment into their current target, inflicting $1280119s1 Shadow damage to players within $1280119a1 yards.

The force of the impact knocks away other players within $1280119a1 yards of their target.
spells.name: Hulking Fragment

spells.description:
Embedded splinters from $@spellname1280113 inflict $s1 Shadow damage every $t1 sec for $d. This effect stacks.

Upon removal, the splinters dissolve, leaving behind $@spellname1284628.
spells.name: Umbral Splinters

spells.coaching_note: The pool left behind when Hulking Fragment's Embedded Splinters are removed or expire — a ground damage zone. Move out of it.
spells.description: The dissolved splinters form a pool on the ground for $d, inflicting $1284633s1 Shadow damage every $1284633t1 sec to players within.
spells.name: Stygian Ichor

movement_freedom.name: Disengage
movement_freedom.note: Requires the Posthaste talent — Disengage then frees ALL movement-impairing effects.

externals.name: Pain Suppression
externals.note: Pain Suppression — 40% damage reduction (Discipline Priest).

externals.name: Guardian Spirit
externals.note: Guardian Spirit — prevents a lethal hit + 60% increased healing (Holy Priest); ally-castable, the highest-value external.

control.name: Psychic Scream
control.note: Dangerous: feared mobs may pull unwanted groups of mobs and unstack the pull.

externals.name: Dispersion
externals.note: Dispersion — ~75% reduction + immunity to many effects (Shadow Priest).

externals.name: Evasion
externals.note: Evasion — large dodge chance vs PHYSICAL/melee attacks (Rogue).

externals.name: Cloak of Shadows
externals.note: Cloak of Shadows — full MAGIC immunity for a few seconds (Rogue).

externals.name: Cheat Death
externals.note: Cheat Death — a killing blow instead leaves you at a sliver of health + reduced damage for a few seconds; a passive cheat-death (Rogue).

target_drop.name: Vanish
target_drop.note: Vanish — stealth drops you as a target (Rogue).
